workflow_rule: Generate all character sheets inside CLE3 only. Do not import legacy generated assets from other repos.

characters.name: 예원제 (叶文洁)
characters.prompt: Character reference sheet, full body front-focused portrait for Ye Wenjie, young 22-year-old Chinese woman in 1967. Short black bob hair, large round expressive eyes, sorrowful but determined expression, slim build, deep blue uniform jacket with bold white buttons, white shirt, simple dark shoes. Bold clean ink linework, flat vibrant cell-shaded colors, rounded expressive character design, dramatic but playful 1980s Akira Toriyama manga aesthetic. Clean white background, production-ready character sheet.

characters.name: 청신 (程心)

Bold clean ink linework, flat vibrant cell-shaded colors, rounded expressive character design, dramatic but playful 1980s Akira Toriyama manga aesthetic. Clean white background, production-ready character sheet.

characters.name: 스치친 (史强)
characters.prompt: Character reference sheet, full body front-focused portrait for Shi Qiang, rough Chinese male detective in his 40s. Messy black hair, heavy beard stubble, narrow tired eyes, bulky body, dirty open white shirt, worn work jacket, loose trousers, boots, cigarette as signature prop. Bold clean ink linework, flat vibrant cell-shaded colors, rounded but rugged expressive design, dramatic but playful 1980s Akira Toriyama manga aesthetic. Clean white background, production-ready character sheet.
